title: Two Sum
description: Given a list of integers nums and an integer target, return the indices of two numbers that add up to target. Print two indices in increasing order, or -1 if no pair exists.
starter_code:
def solve():
    n = int(input().strip())
    nums = list(map(int, input().split()))
    target = int(input().strip())
    # print two indices or -1
